steps.title: Keep the ratio unchanged
steps.content: The ratio of $m$ to $n$ stays the same only if both quantities are multiplied by the same factor.

steps.title: Use the same multiplier
steps.content: Since $m$ is multiplied by $19$, $n$ must also be multiplied by $19$. $$\frac{19m}{19n}=\frac{m}{n}$$ The answer is 19.
